summary: Audience recording with good sound captures a high‑energy, must‑hear set.
review: The reviewer describes the second set as fantastic and full of high energy, calling it a must‑listen performance. Although no specific technical details are given, the audience source is praised enough to suggest a clear and enjoyable listening experience.
